/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/src/renderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/src/detector.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/src/event_loader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/src/camera.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/src/particles.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/src/hud.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/src/shader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/src/gui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/opencern-sim.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o" -o opencern-sim  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo
